items.title: Score Samsung’s Bespoke AI all-in-one washer/dryer combo with a ventless heat pump down at $1,850 for July 4th, more
items.summary: As part of Best Buy’s 4th of July Sale, you can currently find tons of appliance deals from multiple brands, like the Samsung Bespoke AI All-in-One 5.3 cubic feet Electric Washer/Dryer Combo with Ventless Heat Pump dropping to $1,849.99 shipped once it’s in your cart. This deal beats out Samsung’s pricing by $349. While Samsung may directly tack on a $3,299 MSRP, it’s dropping down here from a slightly lower $2,970 full price to $2,200, but you’ll be getting an extra $350 savings within your cart. While we have seen it go a bit lower in the past, this is still a solid $1,120 markdown off the going rate ($1,449 off the MSRP) for one of the best prices we have tracked in 2026. You can also find its vented counterpart down at $1,999.99 shipped, too, and be sure to check out all Best Buy’s July 4th appliance deals here while they last through the weekend.

items.title: Swap out that plastic dish drying rack for stainless steel while this large unit is $31
items.summary:
Delamu Large Stainless Steel Dish Drying Rack

Buy for $31 (Reg. $42)

Clip the on-page $6 off coupon.

What we love

It doesn’t matter if you wash all your dishes by hand, or only here and there, a dish drying rack is worth having around. It’s nice to ditch plastic in favor of a more premium looking stainless steel solution, and this offering does that without breaking the bank.

items.title: Bag a spare Apple Watch charging cable with 20W adapter for just $14
items.summary:
LISEN USB-C Apple Watch Charger with 20W Adapter

Buy for $14 (Reg. $23)

What we love

If you could use a spare Apple Watch cable, it’s hard to go wrong with this solution from LISEN. Not only do you get the cord, but also a 20W power adapter and the price is only $14 Prime shipped. Best of all, LISEN touts that a Series 11 can be charged to 80% “in just 30 minutes.”

items.title: Snag Fanttik’s USB-C rechargeable 2-in-1 digital tape measure with color display for $60 (Reg. $90)
items.summary:
Fanttik A10 Pro 2-in-1 Digital Tape Measure

Buy for $60 (Reg. $90)

What we love

If you only need a small mechanical tape measure for most things and can rely on a laser for everything else, Fanttik is ready to pave your way to that upgrade. The physical tape spans 9.8 feet and the laser can capture a range of up to 165 feet. This data is displayed on the color screen. When the battery is low, just plug it in via USB-C to top it off.

items.title: Add AC outlets to your vehicle while TESSAN’s 200W power inverter is down at $20
items.summary:
TESSAN 200W Car 8-in-1 Power Inverter

Buy for $20 (Reg. $24)

What we love

A lot of car chargers focus on USB-A and Type-C, but this inverter not only tackles those, but also delivers a couple of AC outlets. This makes a solid option that’s ready for all sorts of things, with enough headroom to support up to 200W across the board.
